rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL HUGHES VS. PATRICIA KETTERING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compelresponses To Request For Production Of Dcuments Set One; Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories Set One; Deem Admissions And Request For Monetary Nad Terminating Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, Decemner 7, 2015, line 7. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HUGHEs' Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Set One; Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories Set One; Deem Admissions And Request For Monetary Nad Terminating Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide verified Reponses to Special Interrogatories, From Interrogatories and Requests for Admission; Defendant shall also provide verified responses without objections to Request for Production. Responses shall be hand delivered within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,040. Motion is otherwise DENIED. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: BALLYHALLINAN FAMILY LP VS. SIDDHARTH SAHNI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service; Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, Decemner 7, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT SIDDHARTH SAHNI's Motion To Quash Service DENIED.
